chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D-1185 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.5189/2021. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.5190/2021. 4. For hearing of main case. 15.07.2021 Mr. Fakharuddin Dahraj, Advocate for the petitioner. == 1. Urgency is disposed of. 2to4. Heard arguments. The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for possession of Rama Pir Temple Islamkot by dispossessing the private respondents in possession whereof. The issue of dispossession and possession involving factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its Constitutional Jurisdiction under the garb of harassment and protection. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with the pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*,
